summary: Sci-Fi radar sweep scanning animation map component for Remotion.

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/map-radar-scan/src/MapRadarScan.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `MapRadarScan` and `mapRadarScanDefaultProps`, then register the `MapRadarScan` composition with duration 120, fps 30, width 1920, and height 1080.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Map Radar Scan Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/map-radar-scan to my project. Preserve the exported MapRadarScanProps API and register the MapRadarScan composition with the default props.
